name: Platinum Reserve Credit Card

rewards.displayRate: 1 Membership Rewards Point / ₹50 spent on eligible categories
3 Membership Rewards Points / ₹50 spent via Reward Multiplier on select brands

domestic: 12 complimentary visits in a year, limited to 3 visits per quarter.
international: 2 complimentary Priority Pass lounge visits in a year.
Priority Pass membership worth US$99 is complimentary on enrolment.
Visits beyond the 2 complimentary visits are charged at prevailing rates, currently US$35 per person per visit.

exclusions: EMI conversion at point of sale
excluded spends as per American Express terms

joiningBenefitsValued.label: 11,000 Membership Rewards points as welcome gift on spending ₹30,000 within first 90 days

joiningBenefits: 11,000 Membership Rewards points as welcome gift on spending ₹30,000 within first 90 days

milestones.label: ₹1,000 monthly voucher on spending ₹50,000 or more in a calendar month, redeemable across partner brands such as Tata CLiQ Luxury, BookMyShow, and MakeMyTrip, subject to enrolment

milestoneBenefits: ₹1,000 monthly voucher on spending ₹50,000 or more in a calendar month, redeemable across partner brands such as Tata CLiQ Luxury, BookMyShow, and MakeMyTrip, subject to enrolment
additionalBenefits: Golf benefit up to twice per month on meeting monthly spend criteria
RewardXcelerator offers 5X rewards on participating brands

transferPartnerValuations.note: 1 Membership Rewards point -> 1 Marriott Bonvoy point

salaried: Employed with personal annual income of ₹6 lakh and above
Good credit history with no payment defaults
Resident Indian with current or permanent residential address in India
selfEmployed: Self-employed with personal annual income of ₹6 lakh and above
Company has been trading for more than 12 months
Resident Indian with current or permanent residential address in India

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-08
Golf benefit requires monthly spend of ₹50,000 and allows up to 2 visits per month.
Airline transfers are currently listed at a 2:1 ratio, while Marriott Bonvoy transfers at 1:1 and Hilton Honors transfers at 1:0.9.
